faq_what_is_bridge_answer: Bridge is a secure file transfer platform that lets you send files and messages directly to anyone via Telegram or WhatsApp — no email, no sign-up, no hassle.
faq_telegram_username: How do I find my Telegram username?
faq_telegram_username_answer: Open Telegram → Settings → your username starts with @. Example: @dhruv_19
faq_register_bot: How do I register for the Telegram bot?
faq_register_bot_answer: Search @File_Bridge_19_bot on Telegram and tap Start. You are now registered forever!
faq_whatsapp_access_answer: Click the WhatsApp tab, then scan the QR code with your own WhatsApp (Settings → Linked Devices → Link a Device). That's it — no phone verification needed! Your session is saved and will auto-reconnect.
faq_multi_send: Can I send to multiple people at once?
faq_multi_send_answer: Yes! Separate usernames or phone numbers with commas. Example: @user1, @user2
faq_schedule_answer: Click 📅 Schedule for later, pick a future date and time, and your files will be sent automatically at that time.
faq_file_limit: What happens if my file exceeds 50 MB?
faq_file_limit_answer: Bridge uses Auto-Zip — it compresses oversized files into a ZIP before sending. You'll see a yellow badge.
faq_file_types_answer: All file types — PDFs, docs, images, spreadsheets, ZIPs, code files, videos. Limit: 50 MB per file.
faq_text_only: Can I send just a text message?
faq_text_only_answer: Yes! Leave the file zone empty and type your message. It will be sent as a regular text message.
faq_history_answer: Click 🕘 on the bottom-right to view all past transfers. History is stored locally in your browser.
faq_pwa: Can I install Bridge as an app?
faq_pwa_answer: Yes! In Chrome, click the install icon in the address bar or go to Menu → "Install App".
faq_privacy_files_answer: No. Files go directly to the recipient's private chat. Files are deleted instantly from the server after delivery.
faq_wa_auth_answer: Each user links their own WhatsApp via QR scan — this is the only authentication needed. Your session is saved securely — no need to re-scan on reconnect. You can send messages to any phone number.
faq_data_stored_answer: No. Files exist on the server only for seconds. Transfer history is stored only in your browser.
wa_qr_prompt: Open your WhatsApp → Settings → Linked Devices → Link
wa_qr_hint: One-time scan per browser. Your session is saved and will auto-reconnect.
wa_pairing_info: Enter your phone number with country code to get a pairing code
